article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 19, 2023 (BSS) - In response to the declared Monetary Policy for

H2 (January-June 2023) by the Bangladesh Bank, President of Dhaka Chamber of

Commerce and Industry (DCCI) Barrister Md Sameer Sattar said that this MPS

will help both the private and financial sector to turn around.

He observed that the MPS is primarily aimed at curbing inflation and to

stabilize the foreign exchange reserve.

The public sector credit growth has been set by the Government at 37.7

percent for Jan-Ju

llm_connections.evidence_quote: the Bangladesh Bank hopes to gradually move towards a market-based, flexible and unified exchange rate regime
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly discusses a national-level change to the exchange rate regime framed under 'exchange rate stability', which matches the feature's scope of exchange-rate volatility.
